name: Application Received
subject: We received your application
body:
Hi Aditya Pandey,

Thank you for applying for Full Stack. Our team will review your profile and get back to you soon.

Regards,
Vishal Pandey

name: Interview Invitation
subject: Interview scheduled for your role
body:
Hi {{candidate_name}},

You are shortlisted for {{job_title}}. Please confirm your availability for the interview.

Regards,
{{recruiter_name}}

name: Rejection Notice
subject: Update on your application
body:
Hi {{candidate_name}},

Thank you for your interest in {{job_title}}. At this time, we are moving forward with other candidates.

Regards,
{{recruiter_name}}
